title: War Games and Warnings on Strait of Hormuz Went Unheeded by Trump
summary_full: Over the past two decades, Iran repeatedly threatened to close down the waterway. President Trump underestimated Iran’s ability to do so.
summary_public: Over the past two decades, Iran repeatedly threatened to close down the waterway. President Trump underestimated Iran’s ability to do so.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran repeatedly threatened to close down the waterway.
